content: [Task Assignment] T-ECOMMERCE-065: Execute routine: Process discount code creation and management for marketing campaigns within 24 hours of CMO request
[Task Assignment] T-LEAD-GEN-032: Execute routine: Dedup all leads by email (primary) and company+name fuzzy match (secondary) before routing to Sales Research or CRM entry

[Task Assignment] T-LEAD-GEN-034: Execute routine: Route all qualified MQLs to Sales Research within 1h of qualification, including lead source, BANT score, segment tag, and enrichment completeness flag

[Task Assignment] T-LEAD-GEN-038: Execute routine: Monitor lead source effectiveness weekly -- compare Apollo vs Google Maps vs LinkedIn on enrichment rate, MQL conversion rate, and downstream SQL conversion
[Task Assignment] T-LEAD-GEN-042: Execute routine: Escalate to CMO when any segment has zero new leads for >7 days or when Apollo credits are projected to exhaust before cycle end
[Task Assignment] T-OUTREACH-030: Execute routine: Check responses across all channels (email, SMS, Instagram DM, WhatsApp) every 30 minutes during business hours (9am-6pm ET)

[Task Assignment] T-OUTREACH-032: Execute routine: Update CRM on every outreach event -- sends, opens, clicks, replies, conversions, opt-outs, and sequence completions -- for pipeline visibility and attribution

[Task Assignment] T-OUTREACH-034: Execute routine: Ensure every outbound communication passes compliance check: accurate sender, physical address, unsubscribe mechanism (email), opt-out instructions (SMS), business identification (DM/WhatsApp), no deceptive content

[Task Assignment] T-SALES-RESEARCH-032: Execute routine: Monitor research queue continuously, prioritized by lead score and segment value -- high-value accounts (hotels, corporate) receive 2x research depth

[Task Assignment] T-SALES-RESEARCH-034: Execute routine: Request enrichment from Lead Gen when critical data gaps (missing email, no company data, unverified contact) block brief completion -- turnaround request within 30min

[Task Assignment] T-STRATEGY-053: Execute routine: Monitor competitor websites, social media, and product launches weekly for strategic intelligence; flag significant competitive moves within 48 hours

[Task Assignment] T-STRATEGY-063: Execute routine: Review Ecommerce agent's store performance data weekly to identify strategic implications (product mix shifts, customer segment changes, conversion trend changes)
